verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Behold what manner of man is this, Who stills the raging sea. He heals the sick, the lame, the halt, And makes the blind to see. He opens all the prison doors And sets the captives free. Behold what manner of man is this, What manner of man is He?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He's the Lord of glory He is the great "I Am" The Alpha and Omega, The beginning and the end. His name is Wonderful The Prince of Peace is He He's the everlasting Father Throughout eternity.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Behold what manner of man is this, Who spake to the woman at the well. Everlasting life I will give to thee, Far richer than man can tell And whosoever shall drink of the well Shall live eternally. Behold what manner of man is this, What manner of man is He?

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Behold what manner of man is this, Who speaks to the lame and halt. He says "Thy sins be forgiven thee, Take up thy bed and walk" He stands as the mighty healer now And cries "Come unto me" Behold what manner of man is this What manner of man is He?

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Behold what manner of man is this Who stands between God and man. His eyes are as a flame of fire His fan is in His hand. John saw Him in the seven churches As the sun in brilliancy Behold what manner of man is this What manner of man is He?

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Behold what manner of man is this, Who sits on His heavenly throne. He rules and reigns from heaven above His beloved and His own. He's the lion of the tribe of Judah, The root of David is He. Behold what manner of man is this What manner of man is He?
